reviews.review_description: Basically, all of the missions and shooting range and graphics shown in the trailer are on the pcvr version. It is an incredible game with great gameplay and the zombies game mode really resembles cod. I love the skins on the guns and the multiplayer is smooth and easy. Just get this game on steam and use pcvr to play it, the game is the same price on both but the steam one is infinitely better. All though the pcvr version doesn’t have the survival mode, it’s got a very very long and more interactive campaign. Long story short, BUY IT ON STEAM AND USE PCVR TO PLAY

reviews.review_title: Pros and cons DEVS PLEASE READ THIS
reviews.review_description: I am INLOVE with the game keep up the good work, i think the biggest issue might have to be the grenades.For starters the grenades can kill even if there is no friendly fire, another thing is the hands for reloading, as it gets confusing to use the right hand to reload while using the left hand.The things I like about the game is,DUAL WIELDING( what more can be said about using to christened v's in both hands with 100 round mag?) Also the pistol through the shield. It was the funniest thing i came across, 1 year of owning the game and never new about the pistol through the shields eye holes. Lastly i wish that the shields are bigger and are immune to grenades, or do less damage when a shiled is in front of you, i also would like health bars, and viewing of shield health and ammo left in the mag.THANK YOU FOR READING <3l

If you love shooting games, this game is the best. This bring back the memory of counter strike, call of duty.
Campaign mode is best, you have to complete one to unlock next level. 

This has zombie mode which feels better than Arizona sunshine. You will feel like it’s real as picking up guns, reloading feels so good.
I got it on standalone version idk why it’s so negative but if u don’t care about kinda shi graphics and physics and like to play with friends this is for you
Good game
I couldn't get past the shooting range tutorial because I couldn't two hand the rifle to change the fire mode

I've played through all difficulties of the campaign, and it's no VR Call of Duty. That isn't to say that the game isn't fun, because it is, but it is flawed to a fault. 

The campaign is nothing to write home about, the voice acting is atrocious, and some of the level designs are just flat-out poorly thought out. Guns feel satisfying though they aren't totally realistic. 

My main gripe comes from a technical standpoint. Most geometry doesn't have accurate hitboxes meaning you can't shoot through them, and the main disappoinment is the lack of footsteps from enemies. This means that the only way to be aware of the presence of an enemy is through their voice lines (and what they say doesn't make sense), and the background music. This vecomes a huge problem especially in the hardest difficulty, as an enemy can sneak up on you, and you're only made aware of it when they've opened fire. 

That said, I feel the game is best enjoyed in its medium difficulty, as that's where its linear campaign feels at its best, because you are still at liberty to gun down armies on your own. Whereas the hardest difficulty requires you to play more tactical to even out the odds, but there aren't any tactics to apply as you pretty much only have guns and grenades. 

Add to that the fact that over the course of a gameplay session the game seems to lose its marbles when it comes to tracking your controllers, and it becomes hard to ignore the faults of this game. 

All in all, this game is decent, but it's nothing to write home about.

reviews.review_title: Sound affects ruin it for me
reviews.review_description: The headshot noise is awful and the sound when you reload is so annoying

Id say the game is very good , physics, graphics and gameplay are great some of the weapons damages id say is  a little off but that's most if not all shooters .nice COD substitute. what i wouldn't mind seeing in a game is guns that have reliability issues like jamming and failure to feed and such. like have a separate bar for dependability, i know of at least one or more weapons in there are known for their reliability issues .and when shot in certain places your characters should  react like it's been shot in those places such as limping and restricted arm movement and so on ,but that's me . Zombie mode is tough imo that's the most lacking id say but ,in all 4.2 of 5

reviews.review_title: Good VR FPS gameplay, story needs work
reviews.review_description:
The gameplay is good enough and the graphics look okay, but the story seemed like there wasn't much there.  I don't think I remember many (if any) cutscenes in the game, it's mostly just your character running around shooting the enemies while you hear about stuff happening through radio transmissions or something.  That was fun for the first few hours, then got repetitive.  I need a quality story experience to avoid feeling like the gameplay is repetitive.

Normally I like games that add to the story and game world lore through radio transmissions or audio recordings the player listens to while they play, but there didn't seem like there was much to the story and the lack of story cutscenes that provide additional depth and player experience made me feel like the story was a bit lacking in depth of experience.

I think the devs should continue delivering story with radio transmissions to characters, but also add cutscenes and put more effort into the story aspect of the game.

A five star game needs to have a better story experience, not just good gameplay, but I think this game is a little better than "okay" as-is, so I would give it 4 stars.

after buying this game, i couldn't get enough of it, fun story, great shooting mechanics, but the best thing of all was the voice chatting, meeting people, talking smack, reminded me of the old school days of call of duty, then, about 2-3 months ago, there was an update or something, and not only did voice chat stop working, but i had all of my progress completely reset.

Needless to say, i was very, VERY upset when this happened, tried pt. 2, and although fun, this game was better.

devs, if you read this, fix this issue, and fix it soon, please!

I got my vr about a week ago and this is one of the first games i got for its and i have to say its so super addicting the multiplayer too and the community is somewhat normal i highly recommend this one if your just starting out

it is just amazing. easy to get into and slightly unserious. You can play it like a hardcore shooter or you can run around with an m82 and a balistic shield. The physics engine is just amazingly fun to mess around with. You can shoot grenades to launch them across the maps. 

Awesome campaign. It feels serious and unserious at the same time. The turrets are really cool. Only problem I have with the campaign is the length of it. It took me two days to complete it with 3-4ish hours each day. But there is ingame support for community maps and campaign missions.

Gameplay is really fun. Depending on the difficulty you choose, you can run around with a fifty cal and blast people to smitherins, or youre forced to duck behind cover and stratigize how to get through enemy forces. Theres a large selection of weapons and attachments. You can quickly swap between three different loadouts in the lobby and before missions.

Physics is like the best part of this game. Anything you can pick up can be shot. Mags, grenades, guns, knives, etc. This leads to one of my favorite bad strategies. Hold a grenade in your hand, let it cook for a second then drop it and shoot it in the same instant. Flies across the map and hopefully into a bad guys face. Recoil is very nicely made. While holding weapons with one hand, if the recoil gets too high they drop out of your hand. 

This game is perfect for relaxing after work or school. Just have fun shooting bad guys win this unserious, fun, coop shooter, by yourself or with friends.
I was looking for a good shooting game, and I landed on this one. Let's just say I haven't looked any further. This game is one of the best shooting games
The graphics, mechanics and armory is nothing like the trailer

This game is really fun, and fights for my favorite shooter, going up against Guardians Frontline. The graphics aren’t the best, but hey, it’s VR. Grabbing your gear is easy, reloading is simple, controls are nice. Campaign is pretty short, but playing online multiplayer is fun. Most surprising to me is the community ISN’T as corrupted as other shooters in my experience. Zombies is scary and I hate it (not really but for the lols). 

Only thing I recommend is maybe changing the amount of enemies per player. For example if I’m playing single player, make less enemies spawn than if I was playing with multiple people.

This game is a lot of fun!! Loved the options to customize the guns and the number of guns you can pick from. The campaign was challenging at times, but really fun, and I wasn't expecting the twist. Definitely want to play the 2nd one when I have the money for it!!
Great campaign Greta everything cool attachments recommended if like campaign shooting games

This game is phenomenal with a super fun campaign, especially when playing with friends to the zombie mode and a fun… most of the time fun community I mean, the community is kind of bad but that’s OK. Five stars.

I play this with my friend there's rarely any toxicity in this game but watch out if your playing pvp online cus me and my friend were playing against military people so watch out and it's a very good game.
The games graphics and gameplay are good but not like the trailer (to developer: please make it like the trailer)

Its not good. Simple as that.

Edit:
Downgraded from 2 to 1 stars. Developet reached out on DM to fish after what they needed to do fix their game. Djeezes…. How about perhaps make a game that doesn't require you to do that in the first place? Gave me phrases like how he was «truly sorry for this» to which I replied he was free to refund me if he really was truly sorry. Of course it was just empty words he gave me. Had I run my business like this I would be bankrupt, which I also think will happen with this business in due time.

My initial reply to developer on DM:

Alright. Right off the start… the enemies spawn or gets activated when I get close to them. One second no one is there, a step closer and suddenly they are there. It was quite frankly embarassing to witness. The climbing feature is rather bad… sometimes I try to climb and it just glitches. The solo missions are an insult to intelligence… its just run and shoot, if you try to actually be strategic or tactics you are worse off than just run and shoot. The list is long. Graphics are poor. Gun handling is good. The enemies intelligence is not there at all, they run into each other and get stuck and god knows what. I cant run around where I want in the game world, suddenly I get a warning «return to play area». The list is long…. I tried to get a refund but I had played it over 2 hrs so….

developer_response.body:
hi,
Sorry to hear your opinion. 
Feedback is important to us, so it would be great if you could let us know more what you did not like in Zero Caliber: Reloaded. 
Mark
XREAL Games

reviews.review_title: Please add better left handed support
reviews.review_description:
If you are left handed, you've probably noticed how if you change the player movement to "left handed" you will HAVE to move with the right joystick (which let me tell you, sucks)

Maybe you can make the "belt" customizable, but please, do something.
Other than that the game had many glitches on my quest 2 (maybe a quest 2 issue) and it didn't let me finish the tutorial.

Try to play co-op with a few friends but we all had a complete the mission solo before we could do a campaign together please change this it doesn't make any sense we're not all going to go through it and play it alone before we can play together doesn't make any sense seems like a way to force us to play PVP we went to PVP and we just kept getting sniped over and over again unplayable let us play the campaign get more used to the game then we can play PvP But the gameplay is very realistic really awesome to play I just wish we could play the way we want with our friends and not forced to play PVP when we're not ready

The multiplayer is fun, but when servers are full, it gets really bad lag for everyone and it is almost unplayable. Please fix this and make the servers bigger by at least making 10 players at the limit because eight isn’t enough because there’s still a good bit of people that play multiplayer and sometimes can’t find a lobby. A lot of people have been saying it in the game and I decided to try to do something about it. Please try to fix it ￼￼

developer_response.body:
Hi,
Thanks for letting us know this. 
We have improved on optimization in the meantime, so when servers are full there should not be a lag either. 
let us know if it is fixed or if you still experience any issue!
Best,
Mark
XREAL Games

Let me first off say this game isnt perfect but is a solid game, especially for a quest game.

Pros- good single player campaign, good shooting mechanics, replay factor, and tons of game modes to try.

Cons- Ai is far from brilliant, graphics are just ok, definitely more fun with friends.

In short its a solid FPS vr shooter that is worth a try. Especially if its on sale or in the quest+ library. 

Haven't tried the sequel yet, but I have heard good things.

This game is so much fun. From the shooting range to the missions I've enjoyed all of them. Playing through each difficulty with different weapon setups is great, so many combos you can try. I spent hours in the shooting range, and then went to shoot my airgun, and I think the practice is great.
This game is my favorite shooter game. The campaign is really good has good missions and the other stuff the game comes with is really good. I would highly recommend.
